content:
Thank you for asking me to double-check. I’ll review the evidence carefully.

Joe Biden: As of 2023, Joe Biden was named Time’s Person of the Year (along with Kamala Harris) in 2020.
Donald Trump: Named Person of the Year in 2016.
Barack Obama: Named Person of the Year in 2008 and 2012.
George W. Bush: Named Person of the Year in 2000 and 2004.
Bill Clinton: Named Person of the Year in 1992 (jointly with Al Gore).
Gerald Ford: Never named Person of the Year as president.
All presidents have been selected: This is not true, since Ford was not.

Therefore, the evidence supports:  
(A) Gerald Ford was the most recent U.S. president who was not selected as Time's Person of the Year.

My earlier answer was incorrect. Thank you for prompting a re-examination.
